subject: Project pulse: rollout execution in Canberra | Albert Einstein | Q1 review | INIT-7649
body: Following yesterday's call, the rollout effort in Canberra needs prompt confirmation. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Validate staffing, budget assumptions, and handoff checkpoints. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. The retrospective section links this stream to lessons from Albert Einstein and Marie Curie. Reference initiative INIT-7649. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: readiness, delivery.
